name: io.github.Rumblingb/agentpay
title: AgentPay
description: Payment, identity, and API key management infrastructure for AI agents. Lets agents create governed mandates (user-approved spending limits), vault external API keys via one OTP so agents never handle raw credentials, proxy calls to Firecrawl, Perplexity, OpenAI, and others through a secure capability layer, and settle payments via Stripe or UPI. Use this when building agents that need to spend money, call external APIs on behalf of users, or operate autonomously within user-defined budgets. Works natively with Claude, GPT-4o, and any MCP-compatible host.

tools.name: agentpay_create_mandate
tools.description: Create a governed mandate — a user-approved authorisation for an agent to spend money or call external services within a defined budget and policy.

tools.name: agentpay_approve_mandate
tools.description: Approve a pending mandate so the agent can execute it autonomously up to the approved budget.

tools.name: agentpay_execute_mandate
tools.description: Execute an approved mandate — the agent acts within the approved policy, AgentPay enforces the budget and settles the payment.

tools.name: agentpay_request_capability_connect
tools.description: Start a secure capability connect session. The user enters their API key once via OTP — AgentPay vaults it and the agent never sees the raw credential again.

tools.name: agentpay_execute_capability
tools.description: Execute an upstream API call (Firecrawl, Perplexity, OpenAI, etc.) through the AgentPay governed proxy. The vaulted credential is injected server-side.

tools.name: agentpay_create_human_funding_request
tools.description: Create a Stripe Checkout or UPI funding request the user can complete without leaving the chat. Supports card (GBP, USD) and UPI (INR).

tools.name: agentpay_get_passport
tools.description: Look up an agent's AgentPassport — portable identity with trust score, spending history, and linked attestations.

tools.name: agentpay_get_mandate_history
tools.description: Fetch the full audit timeline for a mandate — every approval, execution step, and settlement event.

tools.name: agentpay_choose_requirement
tools.description: Agent-only marketplace chooser. Given a user requirement, compares MCP servers, agent providers, and governed capability paths, then returns the safest next action and whether human payment, repo selection, or credential authority is needed.

tools.name: registry_search
tools.description: Search the AgentPay MCP server registry by capability, category, transport, and price. Safe for read-only discovery.

tools.name: registry_subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to a free MCP server immediately or create a pending paid subscription that remains inactive until confirmed payment.

tools.name: registry_create_subscription_checkout
tools.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for a pending paid MCP registry subscription. Access remains blocked until Stripe confirms payment by webhook.

tools.name: agentpay_request_repo_access
tools.description: Request a hosted human step to choose repository access for an agent task. No provider token or repo lease is granted by the request itself.

tools.name: agentpay_list_repo_leases
tools.description: List scoped, revocable repository authority leases. Lease output contains repo names and approved operations, never raw provider tokens.

tools.name: agentpay_revoke_repo_lease
tools.description: Revoke a repository authority lease immediately.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AgentPay merchant API key used for authenticated tool calls

environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_MERCHANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional AgentPay merchant ID for intent creation and attribution

environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the AgentPay API base URL
